programme.title: MeatEater - Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddys historical family farm to hunt small game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Crossing Borders: Mexican Bison
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Strange Hunt in a Strange Land: New Zealand Red Stag
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is on New Zealand's South Island for a do-it-yourself, free-range hunt for the majestic red stag. But first, he needs to secure some camp meat in the form of wild lamb. Battling weather and wary game in mountainous terrain, he uses his spot-and-stalk hunting skills to discover Kiwi red stags are a trophy worthy of the wall and the cook pot.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bush Pig: New Zealand Wild Boar
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and local pig hunting expert, Darren Moore, spend a wild, action-packed day tracking down Captain Cook boars in the thick New Zealand bush. Their tools for the job include two tough little pig dogs, a knife, and some real grit. Wild pigs are dangerous critters and this is as visceral as a hunt gets. Along the way, Steve learns a new technique for field-prepping whole hogs.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 2
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Giving Thanks
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: MeatEater - True North: Alaska North Slope Caribou
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and special guest, the author Tim Ferriss, travel to the remote north slope of Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 2
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sonoran Super-Birds: Mexico Gould's Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella crosses the border into Mexico's desert to call in the Gould's wild turkey. Of the five turkey subspecies in North America, the Gould's is the largest but rarest. On this unique Mexican adventure, Steve finds exciting action for gobbling toms. With locally made charcoal at his disposal, he'll grill up a big, brined, delicious bird.

programme.title: MeatEater - Straight Flush: Montana Mountain Grouse
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend Ronny Boehme drive into the mountains of southwest Montana to hunt the high ridge tops for dusky grouse. Ronny's Bracco Italiano hunting dogs have been bred and trained for this work, but can Ronny handle the altitude? The duo prepares dusky grouse jalape√±o poppers and grouse fettuccine with a white wine and cream sauce.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 1
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like they're on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but on this two-part episode Rinella grants his viewers an all-access pass to see just how the MeatEater crew works together to make the show. Strap-in for some behind-the-scenes action.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: Capítulo 117
programme.desc: The leader of the Lodge, Rodrigo, tells Teo he has failed them. Nico reveals to Lupita that Miguel is afraid to love Mia because he feels like he's betraying his father. Rodrigo tells Miguel that Julieta is sick and to stop asking for her.

programme.title: Capítulo 118
programme.desc: Lupita tells Mia that Miguel may not be ready for a girlfriend even though she's in love with him. Giovanni is truly sorry and wants to see his parents.

programme.title: Capítulo 119
programme.desc: Lupita follows Miguel and he sees him with Julieta then tells Mia that Miguel became her boyfriend out of revenge (she's assumes the worst and basically ruins everything). Before Miguel can tell Mia the entire truth she tells everyone she went out with him on a bet.

programme.title: Capítulo 120
programme.desc: Roberta is afraid her mother's reputation will cast a shadow on her career in the band. Marcelino's brother escapes and has him ask for money from Alma and Pepa and steal from other places. Esteban overworks José until she collapses.

programme.title: Capítulo 121
programme.desc: Carlo tells Roberta he is interested in her mom, not her. José reveals to Teo that she was the one who sent the emails, not Roberta.

programme.title: Capítulo 122
programme.desc: Mia quits the band and Miguel is pleased. However, Diego tells her it would be a mistake to quit and Vico convinces her to stay in the band.

programme.title: Capítulo 123
programme.desc: The band needs to get exposure so they try to get on the Otro Rollo TV show. Franco gives Carlo another chance at working for the family company.

programme.title: Capítulo 124
programme.desc: Giovanni and Tomás cover for Diego with Alicia. Everyone in the school finds out in another anonymous letter that José made fun of Teo.

programme.title: Capítulo 125
programme.desc: Roberta asks Teo to forgive her. José blames Lupita for writing and sending out the anonymous letters.

programme.title: Capítulo 126
programme.desc: Giovanni, Mia, Roberta, Diego, Miguel, and Lupita decide to name their band Rebelde aka RBD. Lenny Kravitz gives Roberta his guitar at the Rollo Otro.

programme.title: Piloto: Aquí sí hay quien viva
programme.desc: Meet all the characters, the families, and each department, and also, new neighbor Silvia, who is looking for a new home because the previous neighbors were terrible.

programme.title: Se busca
programme.desc: El Chino consigue trabajo probando videojuegos y provoca que Albertano busque el empleo de sus sueños. María decide buscar novio por internet y, durante una de sus citas a ciegas, el chico la cambia por Betzabé.

programme.title: Celos a domicilio
programme.desc: María busca darle celos a Albertano y contrata a un hombre guapo por catálogo para hacerlo. Albertano muere de celos y le confiesa al Chino que la quiere, éste le aconseja que la vuelva a enamorar.

programme.title: El loco corte de pelo
programme.desc: Abrumada por sus inseguridades, Federica decide hacerse un arriesgado cambio de look. Sin embargo, antes de hacérselo lo consulta con Ludovico, quien no presta atención y le dice que sí lo haga. El resultado es que Federica se desgracia la cabellera justo el día que tiene una cena con excompañeros del colegio.

programme.title: El genio bursátil
programme.desc: Ludovico se mete en problemas en su trabajo cuando, por impertinente, trata de ayudar a Don Camerino en unos temas financieros. Tratando de solucionar el enredo, Ludovico complica todo aún más. Finalmente, y a punto de que ocurra un desastre financiero, Ludovico acude a la única persona que lo puede ayudar: Júnior.

programme.title: ¿Quién está en Barcelona?
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: La ex de Paco
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Piloto: Aquí sí hay quien viva
programme.desc: Meet all the characters, the families, and each department, and also, new neighbor Silvia, who is looking for a new home because the previous neighbors were terrible.

programme.title: Triangulo de amor
programme.desc: Aurelio deals with Ninon. Ninon turns down Tony and Monica. Scrapyard botches nabbing Esperanza but Zoe is killed. Ninon learns of Pilar's past drug habit. Both Aurelio and Ninon are irritated by Pilar's jealously.

programme.title: Ninon "se encarga" de su rival
programme.desc: Eunice notices Suta's affection toward BabyGirl. Raymundo talks to an old ally in Colombia also wanting to oust the Mexicans. Monica and Pastrana take notice of Felina's emerald interests in Europe and Colombia. Aurelio gets to know Ninon.

programme.title: La estampida de Esperanza
programme.desc: Ninon tells her son who his father was. Esperanza is on the run again. Jorge informs the Salvatierras of the truth. Carmen and her kids join the Casillases. Aurelio recognizes the uncanny resemblance of Leonardo to that of Chema Venegas.

programme.title: La frustracion de Monica
programme.desc: Carmen and Rutilla talk. Colon orders Jorge back to duty. Carla gets her interview. Isma and his advisor share an evening, as do the Salvatierras. Both Feline and Aurelio have strange phone calls.

programme.title: Casillas jura vengarse
programme.desc: Aurelio swears revenge to Esperanza. Felina searches for Pilar. Leonardo asks his Mom about the business. Super Javi brings Ruti all the money her Dad borrowed plus interest. Ninon and Pastrana both have eyes on Paris.

programme.title: Uzcategui, en terreno movedizo
programme.desc: Carla asks Ruti for an interview. Paloma has a check up. Dalvio has Roto follow Tata. Esperanza begs Monica for aid. Tony sets up an ambush at the gallery. Monica surprises Felina. Ninon delivers bad news to Aurelio, as does Roto to Dalvio.

programme.title: Una trampa para Aurelio
programme.desc: Raymundo coordinates with Leandro in Colombia. Aurelio smells an ambush. Felina exchanges harsh words to Monica, Monica in return to Tony. Isma brings a date to Ruti's dinner party. Felina and Aurelio go to France and identify Pilar corpse.

programme.title: Season 5
programme.desc: A humble man who wanted to become the most powerful man in the world of drug trafficking in Mexico.

programme.title: Morir antes que entregarse
programme.desc: Jaime poisons Paloma. Salazar and Colon are tracking movements along the shipping routes in Venezuela. Garcia is killed in the gun battle. Teran is suspicious of Castillo. Tony and Monica meet Ninon.

programme.title: Al pie de la letra
programme.desc: Rodrigo Rivero Lanz is executed by Dalvio. Paloma returns to Los Pinos. Juan Carlos searches for Casillas. Teran holds a press briefing setting Tony Pastrana responsible for Rivero and Garcia's deaths. Ninon wants to meet Aurelio.

programme.title: Traicion a la patria
programme.desc: Teran orders a search warrant on Carla Uzcategui. Monica is suspicious of Tony. Carmen plans Nazereno's funeral arrangements. Ruti is a saddened mess. BabyGirl and Suta draw close.

programme.title: Embarazo
programme.desc: Germán has the task of planting small trees that the mayor's office has given them. Someone in the building is pregnant.

programme.title: ¡Voy a ser papá!
programme.desc: Silvia le confiesa a Luis que está embarazada y él comienza a comprar muchas cosas para el bebé. Magdalena y su familia se vuelven ricos y comienzan a derrochar su dinero.

programme.title: La casa de las Lomas
programme.desc: Magdalena les dice a los vecinos que ella y su familia se mudarán a Las Lomas y le pide a Luis comprarle una mansión.

programme.title: Perdimos todo
programme.desc: Luis comienza a molestar a Silvia todo el tiempo queriendo controlar lo que hace para cuidar del bebé. Magdalena invierte todo su dinero en una empresa fantasma y pierde todo.

programme.title: Luisito, corazón de plomo
programme.desc: Magda le dice a Luis que no pueden mudarse a su mansión y le pide de vuelta las llaves del departamento, pero él se niega a dejarlos vivir en en edificio otra vez y todos los vecinos tratan de convencerlo de darles otra oportunidad.

programme.title: El muñeco vudú
programme.desc: Germán y Jorjáis encuentran un muñeco vudú, asumen que alguien está haciendo brujería en el edificio. Pedro, Cris y Vanesa tienen problemas con el WiFi de su departamento.

programme.title: Síntomas empáticos
programme.desc: Luis descubre que es él (y no Silvia), quien tiene los síntomas del embarazo. Los vecinos encuentran en la calle carteles pegados de: "Se busca a Jorjáis".

programme.title: La hija de Jorjais
programme.desc: Una mujer le pregunta a Germán sobre el paradero de Jorjáis, y él se sorprende al descubrir que ella es su hija. Vanessa cree que tiene la maldición de la soltería.

programme.title: Niño o niña
programme.desc: Luis ya no sabe que hacer con Silvia porque tiene muchos cambios de humor por el embarazo, pero sus vecinos lo convencen de darle una sorpresa que jamás olvidará.

programme.title: Conserje aprendiz
programme.desc: Lorena acepta hacer un casting para interpretar el papel de La Doña. Germán decide enseñarle a Borrego a ser un gran conserje.

programme.title: El perfume
programme.desc: Magdalena se aprovecha de las náuseas que siente Silvia por el embarazo para que Luis le compre todo lo que ella quiere.

programme.title: Apolonio y la víbora
programme.desc: Vanesa lleva una serpiente al edificio y se le escapa. Ahora tiene que recuperarla sin que los vecinos se enteren. Silvia y Luis toman un curso psicoprofiláctico con una chica que resulta ser la ex de Luis.

programme.title: La chapa
programme.desc: Luis descompone la chapa de la reja, quedando él y Silvia afuera y el resto de los vecinos adentro. En lo que reparan la chapa, los vecinos usan a Luis de mandadero.

programme.title: Los tocatimbres
programme.desc: Germán cree que los timbres del edificio están embrujados, pues alguien los hace sonar constantemente. Luis intenta colocar unas repisas en el cuarto del bebé.

programme.title: Arturo más pordiosero
programme.desc: Los López Pérez se hacen pasar por pordioseros para recibir caridad. Pedro lleva varios días sin bañarse y Cris le exige que lo haga.

programme.title: El parto
programme.desc: Silvia comienza el trabajo de parto en el departamento, no hay tiempo para llegar al hospital. Luis recibirá al bebé con la ayuda de los vecinos.

programme.title: Vecinos consejeros
programme.desc: El hijo de Silvia y Luis no para de llorar y ya no saben qué hacer. Los vecinos les aconsejan cómo cuidar al bebé mientras Germán improvisa un gimnasio en el vestíbulo.

programme.title: Mucha luz
programme.desc: Hay fallas de energía eléctrica en algunos de los departamentos y Luis tiene que ir a trabajar al departamento de los López Pérez. Germán se prepara para su examen de admisión a la preparatoria en línea.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: This Is That Day
programme.desc: Don't let the down days define you. In This Is That Day, Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that God has given us what we need to win this day.

programme.title: I Thought It Was Through
programme.desc: When despair sets in, it's easy to assume it'll always be this way. But what if a shift in thinking could break that cycle? Your thoughts have the power to disrupt your despair.

programme.title: Don't Let The Attack Distract You
programme.desc: Right when you start to feel some positive momentum in your life, an attack comes out of nowhere. Sound familiar? Pastor Steven uses the parable of the seeds to illustrate what to do when the enemy attacks and how to persevere in your purpose.

programme.title: Premission To Quit
programme.desc: In Permission To Quit, Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us to not let our limitations block our potential.

programme.title: From What If to What Is
programme.desc: In From What If To What Is, Pastor Steven Furtick encourages us to stop worrying about what could be and start trusting who God is.

programme.title: Think Like A Reaper
programme.desc: In Think Like A Reaper, Pastor Steven Furtick shows us how to think about the outcome while living in the fear, frustration, and fatigue of right now. You'll be encouraged that God is with you in your hard place, and help is closer than you realize.

programme.title: All Those Times You Didnt See
programme.desc: The efforts you make when no one's watching are the ones God uses to shape you. Just because you don't see the outcome yet doesn't mean He's ignoring you; He's positioning you. Keep showing up while you wait.

programme.title: I Thought It Was Through
programme.desc: When despair sets in, it's easy to assume it'll always be this way. But what if a shift in thinking could break that cycle? Your thoughts have the power to disrupt your despair.

programme.title: The Hardest Part Is Behind You
programme.desc: Don't judge any one part of your life in isolation or let unmet expectations define your future. God's not finished with your story, and He didn't bring you this far to let you turn back now.
